/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_command_processor.dir/tests/system/test_command_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command_processor.dir/src/system/command_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command_processor.dir/src/system/smart_home_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command_processor.dir/src/devices/light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command_processor.dir/src/sensors/motion_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command_processor.dir/src/rules/condition_rule.cpp.o -o test_command_processor  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/googletest/1.17.0/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/googletest/1.17.0/lib/libgtest.a -lpthread
